response.original_title: Étienne de Crécy B2B Cassius B2B DJ Falcon @ ARTE Mix ø Trabendo 2025
response.overview: French Touch legends Cassius, DJ Falcon, and Étienne de Crécy unite for a high-voltage B2B set with ARTE Mix ø Trabendo. This six-hands mix celebrates French electronic music, past and present.  These three icons defined the 90s French Touch scene, a status reaffirmed at the Paris 2024 Olympics. Cassius (now Hubert Boombass alone since Philippe Zdar’s passing) delivers timeless hits like "I Luv u So" and "1999." Étienne de Crécy, formerly of Motorbass with Zdar, achieved solo cult status with his Superdiscount series. Falcon, a key figure closely linked to Daft Punk’s Thomas Bangalter, rounds out this powerhouse lineup.  Their combined resumes make this trio the ultimate demonstration of French Touch excellence. Filmed on September 26, 2025, at Trabendo, Paris.
response.title: Étienne de Crécy B2B Cassius B2B DJ Falcon @ ARTE Mix ø Trabendo 2025
